description: Headless, performant, type-safe table component for React and Next.js with sorting, pagination, row selection, column resizing, and full accessibility
rules: This is a headless React table library - all styling is via the classNames prop
Use ColumnDef<T> for column definitions where accessorKey maps to data object keys
For server-side tables, set both paginationMode='manual' and disableInternalProcessing={true}
The Table component requires 'use client' in Next.js App Router
Import 'flowers-nextjs-table/styles' for default styles, or provide classNames for custom styling
